overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man game showing the character Miles Morales walking along a waterfront promenade in New York City during golden hour. The character passes by seated pedestrians, industrial structures, and walks through an interactive fountain plaza with the Manhattan skyline visible across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with benches and trash receptacles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade, passing by seated pedestrians on benches to the right

notable_agents.action: person sitting on wooden bench wearing headphones, facing the water
group of people sitting on benches along the promenade edge

entered.detail: metal safety railing separating walkway from water
wooden benches with people seated facing the waterfront
distant city skyline with numerous skyscrapers across the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a waterfront promenade during golden hour, with the character walking forward along paved tiles. To the left, a metal railing separates the path from the water, while to the right, wooden benches host seated NPCs enjoying the view. The Manhattan skyline dominates the distant background across the water, bathed in warm sunset light.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area with industrial storage tanks and tree line

events.description: large teal industrial tanks come into prominent view on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the promenade path, moving past the industrial tank structures on the right

notable_agents.action: person wearing a hat standing near the waterfront railing looking at the water

entered.detail: large cylindrical industrial storage tanks painted teal with weathered patches
tall contemporary glass building rising behind the tanks

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the initial bench area and approaches large teal industrial tanks on the right, which contrast with the modern glass skyscraper behind them. The waterfront railing recedes to the left mid-ground as the path curves slightly, and trees begin to appear on the right side. The Manhattan skyline shifts to the left of frame as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: interactive fountain plaza with vertical water jets

events.description: character enters plaza area featuring grid of vertical water fountain jets
character walks directly through the active water fountain jets, getting wet

agents.ego_description: walking through the interactive fountain plaza, passing between vertical water jets that are actively spraying

notable_agents.action: child playing near the fountain edge, interacting with the water jets
adult standing and observing the fountain display

entered.detail: grid of vertical water fountains shooting streams of water upward from pavement
concrete steps leading up to higher plaza level on the right

segments.scene_description: The character enters an interactive fountain plaza where vertical water jets shoot up from the pavement in a grid pattern. The character walks directly through the active fountains, with water visible spraying around them. NPCs stand on the periphery watching the fountain, including a child playing near the water edge. The plaza features stepped levels on the right side, and the waterfront railing is now visible only in the far left distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined waterfront promenade with planter boxes

events.description: exits fountain plaza and returns to tree-lined waterfront path

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path past planter boxes and trees, heading toward the distant skyline

entered.detail: raised wooden planters with greenery and purple flowers

segments.scene_description: Having exited the fountain plaza, the character returns to a tree-lined waterfront promenade featuring raised planter boxes with flowers on the right. The waterfront railing comes back into close view on the left, and the Manhattan skyline shifts back to center frame. The path continues forward with scattered pedestrians walking in the same direction, and the lighting takes on a more backlit quality as the sun lowers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a waterfront promenade that transitions from a scenic walkway into an interactive plaza before returning to a tree-lined path. It begins with the character walking past wooden benches and a metal railing under the warm glow of the Manhattan skyline. As the camera advances, the scene shifts past large teal industrial tanks and modern skyscrapers, with the skyline sliding to the left as the path curves toward a cluster of trees. The movement then leads directly into a fountain plaza where the character walks through a grid of vertical water jets while pedestrians and a playing child watch from the periphery. Finally, the camera emerges from the plaza back onto the promenade, passing flower-filled planter boxes as the skyline centers in the frame and the lighting becomes more backlit under the lowering sun.
